title: zeltnera multicaulis
intro: Zeltnera multicaulis, also known as the many-stemmed zeltnera, is a flowering plant species in the gentian family, characterized by its multiple stems and bright pink to purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Zeltnera multicaulis include alleviating congestion, soothing sore throats, and reducing fever. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
